subject: [RFC PATCH] mm/mempolicy: NUMA mempolicy mismatch during remote access

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about acquiring mm_struct process's mempolicy and plugging it through, noting that multiple threads within a process may have different mempolicies. Suggested checking both vma and task policies.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: NUMA mempolicy mismatch during remote access patch proposal
